arabic_text:
لا اله الا الله
بسم + الله + الرحمن + الرحیم
ل ال ہ ال ال ل ہ
ال ہ
ل
ا
ہ
english_text:
786
7 + 8 + 6 = 21
2 + 1 = 3
The 3 names of Allah & 3 letters in Allah
Numeric Value = 5
alt_text: Numerological teaching diagram of 'la ilaha illa Allah'. Top-right green box shows the kalima with letter-spelling below it. Red 786 (the conventional numeric value of the basmala) sits left, with the equation 'بسم + الله + الرحمن + الرحیم → 7+8+6 = 21 → 2+1 = 3' linking the 3-letter-count to Allah's three names and three letters. To the right, individual letters ل / ا / ہ are shown with numeric value 5 each.
notes: Numerological/letter-mysticism analysis tying the basmala's 786, the kalima's letter count, and the divine name's three-letter core.
